posts.title: AI Weekly Issue #488: OpenAI lost three things in five days
posts.summary: Quick Hits Musk takes the stand in the OpenAI trial: "If we make it OK to loot..." — Jury selection wrapped Monday; Musk testified Tuesday in the $134B suit to return OpenAI's assets to the nonprofit and oust Altman. Live coverage tracked every hour. The case will set the legal template for what counts as a "for-profit conversion" in AI for the next decade. CNBC OpenAI missed revenue targets — Oracle and chip stocks dragged with it — Reported numbers came in below the forecasts that Oracle's $300B compute contract is collateralized against. Oracle and the AI-chip basket sold off in sympathy…
